name: codex-browser-recorder
description: Record one approved Chrome test flow as a private local video with visible cursor and click feedback.

interface.shortDescription: Save an approved Chrome flow as a local video.
interface.longDescription: Check whether your Mac is ready, then record one short, approved Chrome test flow as a private local MP4. Pointer actions include a visible cursor and click feedback. The plugin records no audio and does not upload your video.
capabilities: Check whether this Mac is ready to record
Record one approved Chrome flow as a local MP4
defaultPrompt: $codex-browser-recorder:record-browser Check recording setup on this Mac.
$codex-browser-recorder:record-browser Record clicking the link on https://example.com.
